title: GIGL-027 My mother and grandmother who found me secretly masturbating while watching AV in my room
overview: Mother, what are you doing with a big vibe! ? A shocking drama about a blunder where a mature woman who has been lazy for a long time is caught masturbating in her son's or grandson's AV! At that time, what will the mother do, what will happen to the son! ? In addition to the main 3 episodes, 4 episodes including the bonus "Mother appeared in AV!"
